human_actions_pending.context: jira_sync_service.py changed this session — subtask step removed. DB may still have old 509-issue count. Re-sync confirms 459 Bug/Bug Task only.

decisions.decision: Atlassian OAuth 2.0 (3LO) over Basic Auth modal
decisions.rationale: Required for future API access + better UX

decisions.decision: Token encrypted with Fernet at rest in SQLite oauth_tokens table
Dashboard shows only Bug and Bug Task issues — no subtasks
decisions.rationale: User explicitly requested: display 459 Bug/Bug Task only, no child tickets

decisions.decision: Single-step JQL fetch: issuetype in (Bug, 'Bug Task') ORDER BY created DESC
decisions.rationale: Removed two-step fetch + dedup — subtasks excluded by user decision

decisions.decision: Jira Cloud API pagination via nextPageToken cursor, not startAt offset
decisions.rationale: POST /search/jql returns HTTP 400 on startAt; only nextPageToken supported. Hard cap 100/page.
Dashboard loads cached data without re-syncing; read vs write separation

next_action: Commit backend/services/jira_sync_service.py with message 'fix(sync): remove subtask fetch — dashboard shows Bug/Bug Task only'. Then /gsd-plan-phase 3.
